page_metadata.biotools__summary:
Updated resources for unraveling the N6-methyladenosine (m6A) epitranscriptome among multiple species.

N6-methyladenosine (m6A) is the most abundant internal chemical modification on mRNAs and lncRNAs and has a broad function in biological metabolism.

m6A-Atlas v2.0 was expanded to include 797,091 reliable m6A sites among 7 species , with 13 high-resolution technologies and 109 conditions.
